raw_title: Audience Expectations of Journalists: Demands, Beliefs and Assessments
title_en: Audience Expectations of Journalists: Demands, Beliefs and Assessments
title_zh: 受众对记者的期望：需求、信念与评估
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了公众对记者有什么样的期望，包括他们希望记者做什么、相信记者应该承担什么责任，以及如何评价记者的表现。
plain_summary_en: This research examines what the public expects from journalists, including what they want journalists to do, what responsibilities they believe journalists should have, and how they evaluate journalists' performance.
research_direction_zh: 新闻学中的受众研究，关注公众对新闻职业的认知、期望与信任关系。
research_direction_en: Audience research in journalism, focusing on public perceptions, expectations, and trust relationships with the journalistic profession.
